title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - Yes
scenario: Clear Trusted Devices via Device Settings > Reset Device removes headset from Bluetooth My Devices list and requires re-pairing
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Under 'Clear Trusted Devices', tap the 'Clear' button.
5. A warning popup appears stating that the device will power off and any active calls may be interrupted. Tap 'Yes' to confirm.
6. Observe the headset behavior and its status in the app and in the Android Bluetooth settings.
expected: The headset disconnects from the app and Android Bluetooth. The headset is removed from the Bluetooth 'My Devices' list and appears only under 'Other Devices' (or similar unparied section), ready for re-pairing.
